{{Quote|I am Deverén. I speak for the Council.|Deverén to Leia Organa and Luke Skywalker|<ref name="hunt" />}}
'''Deverén''' was a [[S'kytri]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] spokesbeing for the [[Supreme Council of the Highland Clans]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Skye/Legends|Skye]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], her [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]]—sworn to serve the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and purposely cut off from outsiders—was visited by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] agents [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], who had come to the world to aid their friend [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] in his dispute with the [[Magister of Skye|Majestrix of Skye]], [[Kharys]]. Deverén presided over the meeting of the Supreme Council that was to decide Skywalker and Organa's fates, and they were fully prepared to hand them over the Empire before Deverén realized that Skywalker carried the [[Anakin Skywalker's second lightsaber/Legends|same lightsaber]] as [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|one of the Jedi]] who had helped save Skye during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. With that knowledge in mind, Deverén and the rest of the Council resolved to help Skywalker and Organa with their [[Battle of Skye (Galactic Civil War)|fight]] against Kharys.<ref name="hunt" />

==Behind the scenes==
Deverén first appeared in [[Star Wars Annual (1977) 1|''Star Wars Annual'' (1977) 1]], written by [[Chris Claremont]] and released in [[1979]]. In the issue, Deverén was illustrated by [[Mike Vosburg]].<ref name="hunt" />
